title: BEM-903 product onboarding
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/pilot/product_onboarding').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

kit = {
  'status':'active',
  'name':'product_repository_onboarding_kit',
  'purpose':'repeatable onboarding of product repositories into managing contour',
  'required_inputs':['repository_id','repository_name','owner_object','worker_object','purpose','feedback_route'],
  'generated_artifacts':['registration json','feedback channel stub','rule inheritance stub','evaluation stub'],
  'operator_gate':'real product/client repository choice remains strategic'
}
Path('governance/pilot/product_onboarding/onboarding_kit.json').write_text(json.dumps(kit, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

sample = {
  'repository_id':'PROD-PILOT-SYNTHETIC-001',
  'repository_name':'synthetic-pilot-product',
  'owner_object':'OBJ-DIR-001',
  'worker_object':'OBJ-WRK-001',
  'status':'synthetic_candidate',
  'purpose':'synthetic pilot repository for validating onboarding before real operator selection',
  'feedback_route':'product curator -> worker curator -> director curator',
  'inherits_rules_from':'governance/state/rule_registry.json',
  'message_channel':'governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl',
  'evaluation_profile':'governance/pilot/evaluation/synthetic_pilot_evaluation_profile.json'
}
Path('governance/pilot/product_onboarding/synthetic_product_registration.json').write_text(json.dumps(sample, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

feedback_stub = {
  'status':'active',
  'source_repository':'PROD-PILOT-SYNTHETIC-001',
  'allowed_feedback_types':['incident','fix','improvement','rule_candidate','metric_result'],
  'route':'curator-to-curator only',
  'rule_refs':['RULE-006','RULE-010','RULE-011']
}
Path('governance/pilot/product_onboarding/feedback_channel_stub.json').write_text(json.dumps(feedback_stub, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

required = ['repository_id','repository_name','owner_object','worker_object','purpose','feedback_route']
errors = []
for f in required:
    if f not in sample or not str(sample.get(f,'')).strip():
        errors.append('sample missing ' + f)
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'

tool = '''# BEM-903 product onboarding validator
import json
from pathlib import Path
sample = json.loads(Path("governance/pilot/product_onboarding/synthetic_product_registration.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
required = ["repository_id","repository_name","owner_object","worker_object","purpose","feedback_route"]
errors = []
for field in required:
    if field not in sample or not str(sample.get(field, "")).strip():
        errors.append("missing " + field)
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_product_onboarding.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM903_PRODUCT_ONBOARDING.md').write_text('# BEM-903 Product onboarding kit\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nKit: governance/pilot/product_onboarding/onboarding_kit.json\n\nSynthetic registration: governance/pilot/product_onboarding/synthetic_product_registration.json\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM903_PRODUCT_ONBOARDING_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-903 product onboarding proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/pilot/product_onboarding/onboarding_kit.json','governance/pilot/product_onboarding/synthetic_product_registration.json','governance/pilot/product_onboarding/feedback_channel_stub.json','governance/tools/validate_product_onboarding.py','governance/reports/BEM903_PRODUCT_ONBOARDING.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM903 product onboarding ' + status)
"""
